ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "particle_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each particle track */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that generated the track */,
  "tof" REAL /* Time of flight of the particle */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled by the particle */,
  "polar" REAL /* Polar angle of the particle */,
  "azimuthal" REAL /* Azimuthal angle of the particle */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the particle */,
  "particle_type" TEXT /* Type of particle (e.g., proton, electron) */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge of the particle */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the particle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_particle_tracks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that was accessed */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the particle track that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES particle_tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file from which the data was imported */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment to which the data was imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyzed_data" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that was analyzed */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the particle track that was analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyzed_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyzed_data_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES particle_tracks ("track_id")
)
